description: Static install manifest for Agent Harness setup planning. Profiles here are dry-run install surfaces, not runtime profiles.

claude.description: Claude Code user-level rules, hooks, and MCP config.

codex.description: Codex user-level AGENTS policy, hooks, and MCP config.

gemini.description: Gemini CLI shared rules and MCP config.

antigravity.description: Antigravity IDE MCP config; rules are shared through ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md.

runtime-rules.description: Shared profile policy, tool routing rules, and distilled integrations rendered by merge_settings.py.

mcp-config.description: MCP server entry pointing each client at this repo's mcp_server.py.

graph-review.description: CRG-lite static graph review tools: minimal context, changed-symbol blast radius, risk/test gaps, graph health.

hooks.description: Client hook bridge for profile injection, edit events, and lesson capture where the client supports hooks.

lessons.description: Local/global lesson memory files and curator wiring.

llmwiki.description: Optional local/global wiki seed used for retrieval-oriented memory.

auto-watch.description: Windows startup task and background file watcher. Runtime profile still decides whether it exits immediately.

dashboard.description: Optional local web dashboard; manual start only.

standard.description: Rules, MCP, hooks, lessons, and llmwiki seed.

full.description: Standard setup plus Auto-Watch startup task and optional dashboard marker.
